name: @tiangong-lca/cli
description: Unified TianGong LCA CLI with direct REST adapters and low-entropy command surface.

scripts.test:coverage: npm run build && TIANGONG_COVERAGE=1 c8 --reporter=text --reporter=text-summary --reporter=json-summary --report-dir coverage node --import tsx --test
scripts.prepush:gate: npm run lint && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:coverage:assert-full
scripts.clean: node --eval "import('node:fs').then(({ rmSync }) => rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
